faqs.question: I'm curious about the reputation of Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar. Is it considered a good place for education?
faqs.answer: Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar is a reputed institute for M.Sc, UG Diploma, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc. Courses. Students can opt for these programs to pursue their career in Science, Design, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce. The Institute has trained and experienced faculty members who deliver these programs. Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar has a review rating of 4.35 on the basis of Shiksha reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.5 on Campus Life, 3.5 on Placements, 4.5 on Faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar offers?
faqs.answer: Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar provides programmes including M.Sc, UG Diploma, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc. in streams such as Science, Design, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Food & Nutrition, Biochemistry, Home Science.

faqs.question: Does Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar has a rating of 4.5 for the Faculty by students. This shows that the institute has qualified, and experienced faculty members.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar offers M.Sc.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Govt. College For Women, Gandhi Nagar.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell in our college. Our college does not provide placements. You can get a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month after passing graduation with good marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good. All classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. All labs are good. The library has a huge collection of books with Wi-Fi. Our college has 4 girls' hostels and a common room. Washrooms are not good. The hostel is quite cost-effective.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified. They are not helpful. The syllabus is easy and relevant. Semester exams are easy to pass. Teachers don't take responsibility carefully. You can pass semester exams by studying a day before exams. You have to refer to the previous year's questions.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students in our class got their dream jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were good as they contained smart boards. Various subjects were taught through those boards. It helped students to understand the topics in a better way.
review_content.Faculty: The curriculum was good. It included various activities that helped students to build up their confidence. It helped to boost their personalities. Teachers were very helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Stitching and Tailoring - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has friendly teachers.

review_content.Placements: Many students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. The top recruiting company was Vardhman. Almost 99% of students got internships. Top roles offered were stitching, making threads, supervising, making sheets, paper cutting, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided a hostel facility. The hostel has electricity, a washing machine, labs, books, a mess, medical facilities, games, and sports. The hostel rooms were clean.

reviews_list.review_title: Padma Shri Padma Sachdev Govt. PG College for Women, Gandhi Nagar (Cluster University of Jammu).

review_content.Placements: There is no type of placement offered by our college to any students, but they offer a paid internship to students, and students have to get a job on their own. Students have to learn skills in this college to get a job after graduating.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure and good buildings, and has different types of departments which have very good faculty. They help students and college have different parks and different playgrounds, and also have a huge parking ground, which is huge, and the college has a huge amount of land.

college_info.college_name: School of Design and Visual Arts, Apeejay Stya University

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for School of Design and Visual Arts, Apeejay Stya University admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: School of Design and Visual Arts, Apeejay Stya University offers two courses in various specialisations, which are Bachelor of Design and MA in Design in: Fashion Design, Interior Design, Graphic Design and Animation and Multimedia Design. Students are constantly encouraged to explore new vistas of creativity, innovation and aesthetics. With the Liberal Arts approach, students get the freedom to choose their own major and minor subjects from wide ranging subjects of ‘Core’ set, thus, expanding their overall horizon which in turn reflects in their capabilities in Design and Visual Arts as well. Design graduates acquire multiple skills- critical thinking, a sharp eye for detail & project management – and these carry a huge appeal in the eyes of potential employers. The Design programmes enable the Design graduates to develop creative and problem-solving skills required to answer consumer, business and institutional needs in the public as well as the private sector. The details of some of the courses are as follows:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: A creative space for the students for their all around development.

review_content.Placements: The placement system is not that good, but the course value is such that you will find a good platform for yourself. You can also apply from the college. If there are any good platforms for the students, the college will inform them regarding the vacancies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good; it is situated away, on the outskirts of the city preventing the disturbance from the city noise and the environment is eco-friendly and a safe environment is provided to the students. Also, there is a hostel for the students inside the college premises. The college has a canteen for all the students. There are a gym and a sports arena for the fitness and sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Graphic Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the worst college, and you will spoil your future here.

review_content.Placements: The university doesn't help us with placements. They rarely send you some leads, and those will be from startups. For 4 years in design, all I have learned is how to work on thesis. They didn't teach us how to use software or about typography.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor. There is no AC. I don't recommend this college for designing. The computer lab has PCs from 2000. The teachers learn the software from YouTube and come to teach us. The food is the worst. The music room is filled with broken instruments. They don't have proper sports facilities.

individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure and faculty, but you'll get placed somehow.

content.Placements: I'm in my 3rd year and I don't have that much idea about placements but from what I have heard, placements are decent but not very good in my opinion. They will get you a job but won't be a very high-status job. I think my seniors are also doing internships on their own.
content.Infrastructure: I do not go to hostels, but according to my friends, living in their hostel is pretty decent but you're not allowed to leave the campus after 7 p.m., and even if you do, they will ask your parents for permission every time you leave and food is good at the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphic Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements with good salary packages.

content.Faculty: Teachers are good, professional, and very helpful. They help you in every situation at any time.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Design and Visual Arts Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Apeejay Stya University offers accommodations facility which includes including well-furnished rooms, Wi-Fi connectivity across all rooms, special access to the library and computer lab, provision for indoor and outdoor games, night cafe etc.

library.description: Apeejay Stya University has a well-stocked, fully automated library stocked with over 45000 books including journals, periodicals etc, equipped with online supports like DELNET (Developing Library Network), INDSET, etc. Library also offers library services like OPAC (On-line Public Access Catalogue), CAS (Current Awareness Service) inter-library loan service, digitize question papers, e-mail alerts, library news bulletins etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Athletics Track, Kabaddi Courts, Squash/ Tennis Courts, Mini Golf, Table-Tennis

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure and faculty, but you'll get placed somehow.
reviews.review_text: I do not go to hostels, but according to my friends, living in their hostel is pretty decent but you're not allowed to leave the campus after 7 p.m., and even if you do, they will ask your parents for permission every time you leave and food is good at the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements with good salary packages.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned rooms. Wi-Fi is available. The canteen is good. Sports are available. The mess food is good. They serve almost 50 types of food at decent prices.

reviews.review_heading: A creative space for the students for their all around development.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; it is situated away, on the outskirts of the city preventing the disturbance from the city noise and the environment is eco-friendly and a safe environment is provided to the students. Also, there is a hostel for the students inside the college premises. The college has a canteen for all the students. There are a gym and a sports arena for the fitness and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college, and you will spoil your future here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. There is no AC. I don't recommend this college for designing. The computer lab has PCs from 2000. The teachers learn the software from YouTube and come to teach us. The food is the worst. The music room is filled with broken instruments. They don't have proper sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college if you are pursuing interior or journalism as your career.
reviews.review_text: The labs, Wi-Fi, food everything is available. The canteen, medical facilities sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and great faculty members with the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in our college are very clean and hygienic. The library is huge and has all the books you need. Medical room has all the facilities provided. The designing labs have all the basic equipment. The quality of the food served is very good and very reasonable. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues in the college.

highlights.summary:
A few updates on NIELIT Delhi are as follows:

The Union Minister of Electronics and Information Technology, Mr Ashwini Vaishnaw, officially launched the NIELIT Digital University (NDU) in New Delhi. It will offer industry-specific courses in fields such as AI, Data Science, Cybersecurity, and Semiconductors. He also inaugurated five new NIELIT centres across different Indian states.

table.details: National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology
Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

college_info.intro:
NIELIT Delhi offers long term certificate courses in IT and Electronics field for various levels such as DOEACC 'O', DOEACC 'A', CHM 'A' and 'O' level and Multimedia and Animation Technology 'O' Level. NIELIT Inderlok offers short term/ industrial training/ diploma courses in Digital Marketing, Web Designing, Web Developer, Computer Application Accounting and Publishing Assistant and various other IT, Electronics, Multimedia and Digital Literacy courses. Furthermore, NIELIT Delhi courses list also includes various Summer Training programmes, UG and PG Diplomas etc. The Institute gives admission through online and offline mode. NIELIT Delhi centre fee structure offers these courses within INR 1.2 K to INR 45 K tuition fees.
For more details about courses of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi check out the below video:
Find below the latest information around NIELIT Delhi popular courses, along with other courses:

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at NIELIT Delhi?

The other top sectors that involve the majority of alumni are IT and Operations. The detailed sector-wise distribution is illustrated below:NOTE: The sectors involved in the 'Others' category are Administrative, Human Resources, and Research.
faqs.question: Where do NIELIT Delhi alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the institute has an online placement portal which is free for registration by the NIELIT qualifiers. The institute then presents these details to the employers to create employment. The NIELIT Delhi placement portal slo facilitates prospective companies to examine and shortlist resumes based on needs and skill sets. Subsequently, the portal shall be scaled to permit non-NIELIT qualifiers to submit their details along with a reasonable fee towards placement efforts by the institute.
faqs.question: Does NIELIT Delhi offer campus placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIELIT Delhi offers long-term and short-term programmes in the fields of Information Technology, Electronics and Multimedia. It offers CISCO Certified CCNA and CCENT programmes. NIELIT Delhi courses list has UG Diploma, PG Diploma, DOEACC O Level, A Level, Summer Training programmes and various others. The Institute offers these courses within the fee structure of INR 1.2 K - INR 45 K of tuition fees. Apart from this, the Institute offers these courses with minimum charges of application fees. Furthermore, NIELIT Delhi admission is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must qualify Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% to be eligible for majority of courses. To learn more, check out the NIELIT Delhi courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi accepts scores of JEE MAINS Entrance exams. JEE MAINS is India's most taken and accepted engineering entrance test taken by NTA. A score of 250 and above is considered good for 85 to 95 percentile which can get a student admission into various engineering colleges. NIELIT Delhi's last year cut-off was rank-based. The opening rank was near 40000 and closing ranged to above 1 lakh. If a student secures the 90-95 percentile, they can easily get admission to NIELIT. The cut-off can vary in coming years depending on the average score.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of pursuing courses at NIELIT Delhi varies depending on the specific programme and the level of study. For certificate courses, the fees typically range from INR 1.18K to 19K, offering a budget-friendly option for those seeking specialised skills. For the DOEACC O Level program, which includes 2 courses and spans one year, the fees generally fall between INR 20.8K to 25K. Additionally, for UG Diploma courses, comprising 2 options, the fees range from INR 18.05K to 22K. These fee structures make NIELIT Delhi a relatively affordable choice for students looking to enhance their technical and computer-related skills, with various options to suit their budget and career goals.
faqs.question: Is studying at NIELIT Delhi expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi offers various courses at the present undergraduate level. The fees for UG Diploma courses vary from INR 18k to 22k. The O-level courses provided by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi vary from INR 20k to 25k. Being government-affiliated institution, the fee structure is affordable.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    Supposedly if under unforeseen circumstances you fail an internal exam, you don't have to worry because you will be getting an option to reappear for the exam and give a retest. A candidate must submit a new application through the TP and pay the necessary exam cost to be considered for the same position. Such cases would be arranged in conjunction with the upcoming primary exam, which would take place at the exam site or any other nearby center. The whole authority to schedule such tests while taking their budgetary sustainability into account belongs to RC. Usually, scheduling an exam takes 30-45 days.
faqs.question: What happens if a student fails internal exams in NIELIT Delhi?

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty members and awesome infrastructure with great placements.

review_content.Placements: There is a huge scope for placements. Lots of students get their placements in different multinational companies of the information technology industry. Students of not only my branch, but other branches are also getting regular placements. Last year also, the placement percentage was above 90%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire college is spread across many acres of area. The buildings are renovated at regular intervals of time. All the buildings are of high quality which is very good. The campus has many sports grounds also, like a basketball court, volleyball court, etc. It also has a swimming pool.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good. The reputed companies visit the campus. The salary depends on the education and experience of the student, but minimum salary offered was not below than Rs. 18,000 per month and salary also depends on job profile just like an assistant programmer, website developer, and network administrator. You have to achieve a good grade in your diploma for a better job.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are five labs and four classrooms on the campus. The labs and classrooms are very clean and good. There is also a library. The college is on the second floor of the mall of Inderlok metro station. I didn't like the shops near the college because there are two wine shops on the ground floor of the mall.

faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) Delhi doesn't hold entrance exams; admission depends on course-specific criteria. Cut-off schedules don't apply. For courses with qualifying exams, cut-off marks follow opening and closing ranks after admissions. NIT Delhi JEE Mains cutoff 2023 relies on these ranks, and NIT Delhi GATE cutoff for ST category considers GATE exam scores.
faqs.question: Q: What is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology delhi cut off schedule?

faqs.answer: In March 2000, NIELIT, New Delhi, was established. It is a center that is expertly run and has a solid track record. It is an IT corporation with well-defined strategies, and all of its operations are focused on providing its clients with a full range of IT goods and solutions. It has demonstrated its capacity to deliver high-quality computer education and manage significant projects for governmental organizations across several industries. The Center began operations as a branch office of the Chandigarh Center for NIELIT. Since 1 November 2012, it has been an NIELIT independent center under the supervision of centers. The center has made great strides in the execution of numerous turnkey IT Projects, including the computerization of numerous hospitals and different government offices in Delhi, PSUs, and autonomous organizations of government.The main goal of the NIELIT Centre in Delhi is to develop skilled labor in the fields of electronics, computer science, information technology, and other related subjects in order to produce professionals who are ready for the workplace and to advance e-learning.
faqs.question: Q: What is unique about NIELIT Delhi?

faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi accepts scores of JEE MAINS Entrance exams. JEE MAINS is India's most taken and accepted engineering entrance test taken by NTA. A score of 250 and above is considered good for 85 to 95 percentile which can get a student admission into various engineering colleges. NIELIT Delhi's last year cut-off was rank-based. The opening rank was near 40000 and closing ranged to above 1 lakh. If a student secures the 90-95 percentile, they can easily get admission to NIELIT. The cut-off can vary in coming years depending on the average score.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam scores are accepted by National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi for admission?

faqs.answer: O Level Course is a government foundation course for a degree in computer science. Before it was known as DOEACC, NIELIT (National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology) supplied the affiliation for O-Level courses. All applicants for the "O" Level computing course must have successfully completed their 10 + 2 coursework in any stream, according to the eligibility requirements.

review_summary.college_name: NIELIT Delhi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because the faculty are not great.

content.Placements: There is no placement system in NIELIT. So companies don't provide interviews to students. The percentage of students in my course is high. A lot of students pursue the A level course from here. It is a good course overall. NIELIT also provides short term courses as well.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 labs, 5 classrooms and 1 library. The decorum of classes is good and it can be improved further but overall, it's okay to get studies rather than private institutions. The quality of teaching is a little poor because they are only interested in finishing the subjects.

individual_reviews.title: The college is not worthy.

content.Placements: I haven't passed the course yet, so I don't know much about placements, and also I am not aware of the previous batch. Faculty members told me at the time of admission that after the completion of the course, they will provide some contacts through which we will get a job.
content.Infrastructure: I am studying in NIELIT. Our college does not have classrooms according to the number of students, and they always look for college classrooms which is empty at the time of the class. So, we have to wait for that.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty members and awesome infrastructure with great placements.

content.Placements: There is a huge scope for placements. Lots of students get their placements in different multinational companies of the information technology industry. Students of not only my branch, but other branches are also getting regular placements. Last year also, the placement percentage was above 90%.

The campus has many sports grounds also, like a basketball court, volleyball court, etc. It also has a swimming pool.

individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are good. The reputed companies visit the campus. The salary depends on the education and experience of the student, but minimum salary offered was not below than Rs. 18,000 per month and salary also depends on job profile just like an assistant programmer, website developer, and network administrator. You have to achieve a good grade in your diploma for a better job.

The college is on the second floor of the mall of Inderlok metro station. I didn't like the shops near the college because there are two wine shops on the ground floor of the mall.

admission_overview.college_name: NIELIT Delhi Admission 2025: Courses, Application, Dates, Eligibility

paragraphs: NIELIT Delhi admissionto the short-term courses (also known as certificate courses) is based on merit and qualifying exam score. Students need to complete the admission process to get a seat at the institute for the desired programme. The application process generally commences online, however, students may apply offline after confirming with the centre. Further, admission to long-term programmes such as NIELIT O level, A Level and CHM O level is done basis of the NIELIT exam and eligibility criteria as prescribed by the institute.NIELIT Delhioffers over eighty courses at various levels. Read the following article to learn all about theNational Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Delhi.

NIELIT Delhi course admission is done on the basis of pre-decided admission criteria. The institute offers a multitude of programmes in full-time mode. TheO-levelandA-levelcourses are equivalent to the Foundation and Advanced Diploma, respectively. Admission to O/ A/ B level courses is done based on the NIELIT entrance exam. Below areNIELIT Delhi coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria

The total tuition fees for the courses offered at NIELIT Delhi vary depending on several factors, such as programme, specialisation, and category of the students. It generally ranges between INR 10,000 and INR 45,000. Students need to pay the fees as per the institute's guidelines. Students belonging to the SC/ ST category need not pay any course fees as per the government's norms. Check out the table below to learn about the course-wiseNIELET Delhi fees:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

NIELIT Delhi admission procedure includes several steps. The process starts with checking the admission criteria followed by registering oneself. Registered students are then shortlisted based on the course-specific selection criteria, such as on merit/ entrance basis. The institute offers a limited number of seats. Only those who meet the admission requirements are selected. Interested candidates can follow the steps mentioned below to completeNIELIT Delhi admission process:
Step 1: Register Yourself

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the course of their choice. Aspirants need to fill out the Online Examination Application Form. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 500 for an O/ A level course. The application fee is INR 1,000 + 12% GST for General and other candidates (INR 500 + 12%) for SC/ ST candidates.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT shortlists candidates for admission to the short-term, PG diploma programme based on merit in the last qualifying exam. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for non-formal courses. The institute evaluates the application form of the candidates for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are informed about their selection, they need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Is studying at NIELIT Delhi expensive?
faqs.answer: The cost of pursuing courses at NIELIT Delhi varies depending on the specific programme and the level of study. For certificate courses, the fees typically range from INR 1.18K to 19K, offering a budget-friendly option for those seeking specialised skills. For the DOEACC O Level program, which includes 2 courses and spans one year, the fees generally fall between INR 20.8K to 25K. Additionally, for UG Diploma courses, comprising 2 options, the fees range from INR 18.05K to 22K. These fee structures make NIELIT Delhi a relatively affordable choice for students looking to enhance their technical and computer-related skills, with various options to suit their budget and career goals.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi offers various courses at the present undergraduate level. The fees for UG Diploma courses vary from INR 18k to 22k. The O-level courses provided by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Delhi vary from INR 20k to 25k. Being government-affiliated institution, the fee structure is affordable.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for MBA course.

content.Placements: Between 86 and 93% of students will be placed in my course. The highest package will be 1 CPA, the lowest will be 20 LPA, and the average package will be 51 LPA. Top companies will be Tata Motors, Qualcomm, Texas, etc. The percentage of students who get internships is lower than that of students who get placements. Top roles offered are business manager, HR manager, etc. However, some students tend to attend extracurricular activities and courses.
content.Infrastructure: Our college ranks among the top institutions in the nation regarding services and facilities. It offers boundless Wi-Fi access across the campus. Its velocity is 200 Mbps. Our college offers amenities such as a library, student accommodation, and more. Our college is equipped with air conditioning. The accommodation is excellent. The student body managers the mess menu, resulting in monthly changes.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Com. Course.

content.Placements: The number of placements is usually large. Most students got placements. The highest package was around 16-26 LPA, and the lowest was 6-9 LPA. The average is 13-16 LPA. Leading recruiters include Deloitte, EY, KPMG, etc. The highest level services offered are Chartered Accountant, Auditor, etc. Many students have got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is the best college. Wi-Fi is supposed to be provided throughout the campus, but it is still not available. The hostel needs to be improved considerably. Institutions around the world have not used the same hostel in the same way for the last 50 years. Rooms should be properly arranged and locked. Overall, some improvements need to be made.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus offers admission to several UG, PG, Certificate, and Diploma courses. Admission to all these courses is based completely on the merit. Some courses also require an entrance exam in order to secure admission. BDU Trichy only accepts TANCET scores for entrance-based course admissions.  MCA and MBA admissions are based on TANCET scores.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus offers admission solely on the basis of merit. The eligibility criteria varies for each course. However, the admission to all courses is based on the merit acquired in the qualifying exam as well as scores obtained in the course-level entrance exam. Candidates who wish to apply to BDU, must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus offers admission to the MBA programme on the basis of merit obtained in the last qualifying exam and valid entrance scores. In order to secure admission to Bharathidasan University Trichy, candidates must acquire 50% marks in graduation, and must appear for TANCET and secure valid scores.

faqs.question: How can I check Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus cutoff for MBA?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus offers admission to the MBA programme on the basis of the scores obtained in TANCET. The university releases the TANCET cutoff for the course. Candidates can check the cutoff for MBA courses on the official website of the Bharathidasan University Khajamalai Campus.

hostel.description: All the hostel rooms are provided with light, fan, purified drinking water facility, recreation centre, playing ground, news papers and magazines. Every hostels are provided with television and cable connection and wi-fi facility. Mess facility with large dining halls are available in hostels. Wardens  are available for the girls hostel round the clock.The hostels are provided with telephone facility to receive calls from outside. Each hostel is provided with hot water facility in the bathrooms.

library.description: The university library is separately build in a well architectured multi-storyed building in the main campus and is well furnished with all resources including e-library resources.The library comprises a rich collection of books around 	81222 and e-books in addition to subscribing a number of journals and audio-video cassettes. University maintains 223 subscribed periodicals of which 148 are national and 75 are international which covers of all domains of research knowledge. Apart from these more than 8000 e-journals can be accessed on-line through INFLIBNET e resource consortium (UGC- INFONET). The library has separate reading halls.University is also having a digital library where student can access more than 5,000 back volumes and 7,000 electronic books. The library is also having photocopying facility.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Net Ball Court

college_info.intro:
BTech and BSc are the most popular programmes at Suresh Gyan Vihar University Jaipur. By doing BTech in Electrical Engineering from SGVU Jaipur, students will be able to apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals etc. Students will also be able to design the solutions of difficult engineering problems. Suresh Gyan Vihar University has more than 10 schools of study, like the School of Engineering & Technology, the School of Agriculture, and the International School of Business Management. At the UG level, the university gives BTech, BSc, BPharm and many other courses.
At the PG level, the university gives MBA, MTech, MA, MEd, MCom, and other courses. IBM, Maruti Suzuki, Google, and Huawei are among the popular MBA recruiters at the university.
Below are some of the most popular Suresh Gyan Vihar University courses and their selection criteria:

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, declared to be the best private university in Rajasthan, Suresh Gyan Vihar University in Jaipur was established in 2008 and has since climbed the ladder in academic circles pretty quickly. Spread over and area of 32 acres this university offers courses in diverse fields of course including in management. It offers 6 specializations for its MBA program. It has got quit a good faculty and it also boasts of 80% and more placements. It accepts about 60 students in each of these 6 specializations. faqs.answer: A:    The admission criteria for entry into Suresh Gyan Vihar University, MBA, are very simple and elementary. The students who have been seeking admission to an MBA are supposed to have at least scored 50% marks in aggregate in the Class 12 examination conducted by a recognised board or university. Further concession of 5% is given to those candidates who belong to SC or ST categories. After fulfilling this eligibility requirement, the students can sign up for admission by paying a nominal amount of INR 500 as the registration fee, after which they have to appear for the entrance examination conducted by the university, known as SGVUEE. This university also accepts the ranking of the students who have appeared for the CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, GMAT, etc., based on their registration with the university and performance in any of the nationally conducted entrance exams for MBA, declared by the university on its website, shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview. Based on the personal interview, selection for the course of MBA is informed to the students.

faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, Suresh Gyan Vihar University in Jaipur accepts scores of many pan India entrance examinations conducted for admissions to MBA besides it's own entrance examination. Students seeking admission to any institution normally check the all India ranking all the state ranking of that institution and then only apply for admission. In the case of SGVU, this ranking is quite good including NIRF ranking. As a result of this, more candidates apply for admission and as a consequence of this the closing ranks increases. In such situations the particular institute invariably announces a cut off below which students cannot apply. But in the case of this private University in Jaipur, there is no mention of any such cutoff on their official website and therefore we must take it as authentic. Be that as it may, a student has to have reasonably good score in any of the common entrance examinations conducted on pan India basis for possibility of getting admission for MBA in this university. Best wishes to you.

overview_faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, The Suresh Gyan Vihar University located in Jaipur, came into existence in the year 2008. But it traces its origin to Gyan Vihar School that came into existence way back in the year 1994. This university has quite a good reputation in the market or in the academic circles as well. The Pioneer awarded this university ranking of Five Stars amongst the private universities across India. Even otherwise it has obtained or ranking of 71 out of 171 institutions across India by a private agency while NIRF has ranked it in a band of 151 to 200. This university located in Jaipur is famous for combining the best culture of our country in ethics and whatever is followed by our culture and philosophy to teach students about business administration. All in all one can see that people talk very highly about the way this university conducts its business that is its teaching to the students. Best wishes to you.

individual_reviews.title: This college is a very good option for those whose budget is low and who belong to Bihar.

content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students were placed this year. The placement range of each department is very good, and almost all of them are placed. The pharmacy departments placement range is better than other departments, and the placement range of HMCT is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available for each departments students, and facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are also available. Single bedrooms, double bedrooms and 5 seater bedrooms are also available. Good quality food is available in both the mess and the canteen.

content.Placements: I am a student of Suresh Gyan Vihar University pursuing BCA with Google Cloud. Many companies offer to those students who have the highest score ranking. SGVU is a private university located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. It was established in 2008, under the Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Jaipur, ACT 2008, ACT No. 16 of 2008. The parent institution dates back further originally, the system started under a body called Sahitya Sadawart Samiti (set up in 1938), and before becoming a university, had legacy schools & colleges. SGVU is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has approval from the organization.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Jaipur.

content.Placements: I remember when I was pursuing an M.Com from this university, almost 60% of students got placements with the highest package of 6 LPA. Many students got internship opportunities from multinational companies. I pursued M.Com online from this university.

The SGVU library contains a number of books, and I hear it is the largest library among universities. The whole campus is covered with greenery. The SGVU campus is too good for pursuing our degree.

admission_process.title: Suresh Gyan Vihar University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: The Suresh Gyan Vihar University admissionsare open and based on the merit and the entrance exam. TheUniversityconducts its entrance exam named SGVUEE. The registration process for the entrance exam is conducted online.
Interested candidates can check the below table forSuresh Gyan Vihar University course eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
A pass in Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate

Class 12 examination with at least 50% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) with English, Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects, along with one of the following subjects: Biology/ Mathematics
A pass in Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category)
SGVUEE/CLAT
Passed Class 12 with Science (English, Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology)
Class 12 with Agriculture with minimum 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category)

A pass in a recognised Bachelor’s degree of minimum 3 years duration with mathematics at Class 12 level or at Graduate level and obtained at least 50 % (45 % in the case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying degree examinations
Confirmation of Seat Allotment
To confirm the seat allotment candidates have to pay the admission fee as provided in the admission certificate.
lists: Go to the offcial website
Register as a new user and enter your basic details.
Get the email verified.
Complete the form.
Pay the fee with a credit card/debit card or net banking and submit it.

Given below is the eligibility criteria for the same: MTech Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Geoinformatics BTech in the relevant stream with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised university (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Manufacturing and Industrial Engineering BTech in Mechanical Engineering/ AMIE Mechanical Engineering or its equivalent with at least 60% aggregate in the qualifying examination (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Energy Engineering BTech (ME/ EE)/ AMIE (ME/ EE) or its equivalent with at least 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Construction Engineering and Management BTech Civil Engineering/ AMIE Civil Engineering with at least 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Power System Engineering BTech Electrical Engineering/ EIC/ ECE/ AMIE Electrical Engineering/ EIC/ ECE) with at least 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Software Engineering BTech (Computer Engineering/ CSE/ EIC/ ECE)/ AMIE (Computer Engineering/ CSE/ EIC/ ECE)/ MCA with at least 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Digital Wireless Communication Engineering (DWCE) BTech in Engineering with at least 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) Cloud Computing and Security Candidate should have passed BTech from a recognised university or college approved by AICTE/ UGC with minimum of 50% aggregate in Computer Science Engineering/ Information Technology

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Suresh Gyan Vihar University - SGVU?
faqs.answer: To apply offline for Suresh Gyan Vihar University Entrance Exam (SGVUEE), the process is as follows: Duly filled application should be sent by registered post to “Director (Admissions), Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Mahal, Jagatpura, Jaipur (Rajasthan)-302017” along with the required documents & application form fee of Rs 500/- which may be paid through debit card/credit card/net banking (visit gyanvihar.org/online- fee)/DD drawn in favor of “Suresh Gyan Vihar University” payable at Jaipur or manually at Finance department of SGVU.In case of DD, mention the application form number at the back of the DD.In case of other modes of payment (debit card/credit card/net banking), mention transaction ID at the last page of the application form.Candidate will be informed regarding the Student ID (SID) and password through e- mail or SMS or both, after receiving the application. Eligibility rules as specified for each programme shall be strictly followed and shall not be relaxed under any circum

faqs.question: Does Suresh Gyan Vihar University - SGVU conduct GD/PI as part of its admission process?
faqs.answer: Yes, Suresh Gyan Vihar University (SGVU) conducts group discussions and personal interviews as part of its admission process. However, admission to all the Bachelor of Science (Honors) and Bachelor of Science programmes is entrance-based and requires the candidate to appear for an online test. Shortlisted candidates will be called for a group discussion or personal interview round for final selection at Suresh Gyan Vihar University.

faqs.question: What is the minimum marks required for MBA at Suresh Gyan Vihar University 2023?
faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, Suresh Gyan Vihar University in Jaipur accepts scores of many pan India entrance examinations conducted for admissions to MBA besides it's own entrance examination. Students seeking admission to any institution normally check the all India ranking all the state ranking of that institution and then only apply for admission. In the case of SGVU, this ranking is quite good including NIRF ranking. As a result of this, more candidates apply for admission and as a consequence of this the closing ranks increases. In such situations the particular institute invariably announces a cut off below which students cannot apply. But in the case of this private University in Jaipur, there is no mention of any such cutoff on their official website and therefore we must take it as authentic. Be that as it may, a student has to have reasonably good score in any of the common entrance examinations conducted on pan India basis for possibility of getting admission for MBA in this univers

More than 1200 multinational companies participated during the placement session and presented over 13000 jobs to batch 2026. The highest international package secured by the batch 2026 stood at I NR 2 crore per annum, while the national highest package achieved stood at INR 55 LPA . The top recruiters of Suresh Gyan Vihar University in 2026 include Google, Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Infosys , Samsung, etc.

3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

nirf.description:
SGVU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SGVU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, SGVU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SGVU's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SGVU climbed 10 ranks to #39 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

hostel.description: Suresh Gyan Vihar University has total of 6 hostels with 4 hostels for boys and 2 for girls. All the hostels are equipped with facilities like- Wi-Fi, free gymnasium and yoga classes, baking facility, indoor and outdoor games, computer lab, hygienic mess services on complimentary basis.

library.description:
Library has subscribed/procured about 1724 online journals through DELNET. The total number of printed holdings are more than One Lakh, including various, books on varied streams, printed journals, and magazines, dissertation of M-Tech scholars and Research thesis of PhD candidates including various fields of Engineering & Technology , ISBM , Pharmacy , BHMCT , Bio Science , Education , Braille Books , Distance Education ,Book Bank , Agriculture. 

The central library is member of ‘Developing Library Network' DELNET (DATABASE services). Users can access various database of about 2 crore books, journals, thesis, non-print materials etc. available with 4697 INDIAN and Foreign library.

reviews.review_heading: This college is a very good option for those whose budget is low and who belong to Bihar.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available for each departments students, and facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are also available. Single bedrooms, double bedrooms and 5 seater bedrooms are also available. Good quality food is available in both the mess and the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good because of the faculty, good environment, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities available in the college, like good classrooms and a library system, are good. If you need any help or want to borrow a book, you can. All is going well. SGVU is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has approval from organizations like All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), professional/sectoral regulators depending on the course (e. g., for Pharmacy, Agriculture, etc. ).

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good course, faculty members, and campus. Library is good but placements are awful.
reviews.review_text: Library was top-notch with all amenities. Hostels were divided into levels. Level 1 had good rooms and Wi-Fi. The food at mess was actually good. Warden was overall well managed. The girls hostel safety was at its best. It may feel expensive as per the rooms they provided.

reviews.review_heading: One thing I love about is the peaceful environment over here.
reviews.review_text: We have excellent library, full network Wi-Fi, interactive classrooms, well-equipped labs. In hostel it will like home. Well cooked food, safe drinking water, access to gym, ground for various sports. There is also activity area helps to focus on your hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: I visited the university campus once. The infrastructure of the university is large, good, and vibrant. The SGVU library contains a number of books, and I hear it is the largest library among universities. The whole campus is covered with greenery. The SGVU campus is too good for pursuing our degree.

reviews.review_heading: Well-maintained campus with decent placements needs better faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department was well-equipped with modern classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a dedicated library section for academic support. Hostel facilities were decent with clean rooms,  24/7 water and electricity, and good security. The mess served hygienic food with a fair variety, while the canteen offered snacks and beverages. Basic medical support was available on campus. Sports facilities included grounds for cricket, volleyball, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Choose your college- Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and a friendly environment is available in the college. College provides all facilities like Wi-Fi connection, library, and sports complex. The quality of food is very tasty and good and different types of food are available. All facilities are provided in mess and medical facilities are available in college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the industry.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. Hostel have boards and mess provide healthy food. Wi-Fi is available in hostels and classrooms are very comfortable. Library is available. They provide fruits and vegetables in the morning.

reviews.review_heading: Great college and wonderful college life towards studies.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities are available here based on what is important to a student for education and their development. Library with all the latest books, computer labs with fast working computer system are available. There is a good environment for hostel students to live in and various stadium for sports based on the different volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a world of growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are outstanding in my course and department. The whole university consists of Wi-Fi, labs, high connectivity network, AC classrooms, and well-maintained systems. Library is very vast and consists of thousands of books. Facilities like elevator and accelerator are available. Hostels are maintained to a very great extent in terms of cleanliness and greenery. The hygienic food is served in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are top tier and on the other hand,...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for higher education and good for placements.
reviews.review_text: College looks very beautiful and has a big campus area. All rooms are well-decorated and have smart classrooms and labs. The hostel is very good and provides hygienic food. It also provides all resources like laundry, cleaning, etc. The behavior of the hostel staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing facilities with lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of amenities, beginning from our lecture halls and labs, which are well-equipped. All the systems are also quite fast, digital screens are used at the time of lectures. Rooms are also quite spacious as well as well-ventilated. Wi-Fi network as well as LAN is also provided. Additionally, sports and other curriculum activities are also encouraged, playgrounds are there separately for games such as cricket, basketball, badminton, and much more.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing university with great learnings.
reviews.review_text: Suresh Gyan Vihar University shines with its world-class infrastructure, spacious, well-equipped classroom, and labs provide an ideal learning environment. Hostel facilities are comfortable, secure, and homely. Facilities are perfect. Hostel food is also good and quite hygienic as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great experience.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure, with a good amount of invitations and activities, with an event. It is very good, and has a great amount of activities done. It provides a good environment and skills.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great institution.
reviews.review_text: It has a great infrastructure with good water facilities along with breathable rooms. Hostels are newly constructed and good food in mess. It has good paint along with a nice Wi-Fi facility in the rooms and along with fresh RO purified water in the water cooler.

highlights.summary: Northern India Institute of Fashion Technology, Mohali admissions are open for all the courses. Candidates can apply for their desired course through the official website of the institute.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Northern India Institute of Fashion Technology, Mohali offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from various streams such as Design and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, course available include B.Sc. For the PG level, there is an exciting array of courses like M.Sc. and M.Des. Northern India Institute of Fashion Technology, Mohali fee structure ranges between INR 46,000 to 93,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Northern India Institute of Fashion Technology, Mohali offers Degree courses including 2 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, and the students are talented. But a few teachers play politics.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month and the highest salary offered is Rs. 60,000 per month and even above than that. There are many top recruiting companies for our course. Top roles offered in our course are fashion designer, fashion stylist, retail marketing, merchandiser and many more. The lowest salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA, and the highest salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA-5 LPA and even above this range. Every student got an internship. Tarun Tahiliani, Rahul Mishra, Anita Dongre, Ritu Kumar and many famous designers offer internships here. Companies like Zara, Active Clothing, etc., also offer internships here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Textile Design - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and placements are good. Teachers are helpful.

review_content.Placements: Companies like, Tommy Hilfiger, Calvin Klein, Puma and Winsome, Shingora, etc., visited our campus for placements. Roles offered varies from the sales department to the designing and merchandising department. Almost 90% of students got placed in good companies across India. The highest salary was Rs. 55,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 month. All the students got internships from college. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 11,000 month and the lowest stipend offered was Rs. 5,000 month. There is a placement cell in our college. Teachers also help students in getting an internship or a job.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with some of the teachers but good for serious studies.

content.Placements: Placements depend on students' performance. The salary package also depends on their performance, but on average, the salary package offered is 2 LPA. Local companies, including few reputed companies, visit here. Almost all the students get internships from here. We are taught about fashion and fashion forecasting to convert ideas into reality.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not much good here, but you will get basic facilities like fresh water, a clean environment, etc. The infrastructure is moderate, and sports events are not organised. You will get personal attention from the teachers.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied as well as dissatisfied because of its facilities provided.

The area is open and is a good place to think of better ideas. There are different laboratories for different types of work. It also has an airy hall.

highlights.summary: ESEDS School of Design (Techno India University admission) is open for 2025.

college_info.intro:
ESEDS School of Design popular programmes are BDes and various Certification courses. Through its BDes course, ESEDS School of Design – Techno India University tries to build a strong curriculum that suits the latest trends in education and research. The college offers BDes in various specialisations such as Fashion Design & Interior Designing. The college tries to provide various design and theory modules with an emphasis on practical design skills, industry practices, research, and development.
ESEDS School of Design – Techno India University BDes students are placed in top companies in different sectors. BDes students can become Fashion Designer, UI/ UX Designer, Product Designer, Graphic Designer, and others. Below are some of the courses offered by ESEDS School of Design and their respective eligibility and fees:

placements.overview:
ESEDS School of Design – Techno India University is one of the prestigious colleges in Fashion and Interior Design. The college has won more than 70 awards and recognitions in national and international fields. ESEDS is awarded with eminent awards such as The Ethical Fashion Source, ABID Interiors Award, The Creative Conscience Award, Digital Artwork Award for Fashion & UNSDGS, and others. Tabulated below is the list of ESEDS School of Design awards:

ESEDS School of Design – Techno India University Awards (2022)

Candidates seeking admission can fill out the ESEDS application form for the preferred course.

admission_process.title: ESEDS School of Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: ESEDS School of Design admission processbegins with registration. Candidates can fill out the application form online or visit the campus for offline form. Admissions are currently open for all the programmes. Below are the steps to get a seat in ESEDS School of Design:
Step 1:ESEDS School of Design Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the preferred programme. Aspirants have to register on the school's website for the preferred programme. The forms are also available on the campus. Aspirants have to provide basic, qualification and other details in the application form.
Step 2: Entrance Exam/ Selection

For courses such as BDes and BBA, aspirants may need to appear for an entrance exam conducted by the school. For all other courses, the school evaluates the qualifying exam scores of the candidates. Shortlisted aspirants are further called for a an interview and portfolio review round for final selection.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

Selected aspirants are informed about their admission via email or SMS. Further, candidates have to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants also need to pay theESEDS School of Design feeto confirm their seat.

review_summary.college_name: Footwear Design and Development Institute, Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best campus , great faculty and staff

content.Placements: The top roles offered were senior designers, senior design consultants. The placements in the last couple of years have been almost around 96%, and the average package offered was around 5-6 Lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies were Puma, Adidas, Yoho, and a few other companies.
content.Infrastructure: There?s full time wifi available for digital purposes. Footwear Labs has the best machines. The machines are brought from Italy and are maintained. The hostel is pretty good. The food is simple and suits all kinds of people, like North/South. We have a nice ground and a temple as well.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty but hoping for better placements.

content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is unknown but the average pay is 15–16k for freshers. Top recruiting companies include retail conglomerates like Aditya Birla, Reliance, and a few renowned boutiques in the city. 60% of students got internship from my course in companies like Da Milano, Ritu Kumar of reliance, Uniqlo, etc. Most of the students went for off-campus since there were more opportunities. Since I'm in department of fashion design, the roles offered were in retail brands and few off-campus roles like fashion stylists, assistant designers, merchandising, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend this college.

content.Placements: Placements at this college are not good. For our seniors in the fashion design department, they were providing placements mostly in the retail sector. Only 3–4 seniors got placed in a design house. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA, and the lowest was 1.5 LPA. Most people need to find jobs by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are also good and spacious. A library is also available, but it is not always open during college hours. Hostel rooms are good, spacious, and three-seaters. There are two girls' hostels. There is no canteen. For small things, we have to go outside. Mess food is manageable. The condition of washrooms is pretty bad. They clean the rooms once a week only.

review_summary.college_name: TSAP - Thakur School of Architecture and Planning Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Best Architecture College with State of the Art Infrastructure & Curriculum.

content.Placements: The Institute has a Placement Cell and active TSAP Career Advisory Cell, that engage in organizing seminars, workshops, and programs for preparing the career path for employability and setting up of entrepreneurial practices. The cell also conducts guidance sessions for study abroad as well as immersion programs for students seeking options for Masters abroad. While around 60 percent of the students take up placement, 15 percent choose career advancement through Masters and a good number of 25 percent students get involved with entrepreneurial practices.

individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure & faculty members.

content.Placements: The first batch has recently been graduated and are either absorbed in different industries or are pursuing master's degree. And some of them are running their startups. There has been alot of professionals taking keen interest in our institutional activities .
content.Infrastructure: TSAP provides one of the best infrastructure that helps in the development of students. There are spacious air conditioning studios to work, computer labs with highly updated software, wi-fi, well-equipped library with the facility of e-book, workshop for students to work.

individual_reviews.title: One of the best Architecture colleges in Mumbai.

content.Placements: We have a placement cell in the college from the very beginning. Thakur school of architecture and planning is the only college in Mumbai with such a placement cell. It helps students get jobs and recommendations in prominent firms across Mumbai and other places.
content.Infrastructure: Thakur school of architecture and planning no doubt has the best infrastructure in comparison to any other college in Mumbai. We have a huge campus where we get to interact with students from other courses as well. We have one of the best libraries, computer lab and studios.

individual_reviews.title: The college provides great infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Our college has initiated a placement cell where teachers and students work as a team to guide the students in placements. Architecture has a lot of option after the bachelor's degree, so we don't have proper campus placement procedures. The college also conducts various seminars for the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has one of the best infrastructures amongst all the colleges in Mumbai. Our college provides all the facilities for the students. The college takes care of every need of the students. The college also maintains great quality standards. Proper maintenance of infrastructure is also done in terms of hygiene.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college, really good infrastructure, provide placements, good faculty, well-equipped.

content.Placements: I'm not quite sure about the percentage of students placed via placements since there was no formal round of placements and they didn't conduct campus placements. Students were sent to companies/ firms, which has vacancy, for interviews and hence it was like any other interview procedure. But I'm grateful the college has taken efforts and took the initiative to take responsibility of students job since no other college of architecture does that. The average package offered ranges from 10,000 INR- 15,000 INR.
content.Infrastructure: I would take pride in saying that our college has the best infrastructure for an architecture college, as far as I have seen. I can vouch for it since I have attended/ visited many colleges and nothing is at par. We have well-equipped facilities. A huge campus with so many activities and spaces is something to praise. Completely air-conditioned with excellent internet facilities. From classrooms, big studios, computer labs, library, seminar hall, exhibition hall, material library, workshop area, dining area, auditorium, canteen, indoor play area, garden, etc., we have it all for good advancement of a student. The quality of the infrastructure is to appreciate since its hygiene and security level is too good. The quality of food and other facilities is trustworthy too.

admission_process.title: TSAP - Thakur School of Architecture and Planning Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Thakur School of Architecture and Planning admissions are conducted through the CAP portal. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Thakur School of Architecture and Planning is as follows:
STEP 1: Thakur School of Architecture and Planning Application Process 2025

Students should apply at https://cetcell.mahacet.org/cap-_2025-26/. Candidates need to fill out the application form, upload the required documents and get verified online through E-Scrutiny centres. However, candidates may also need to visit the nearest "Application Form Receipt Centre" for documentation submission or verification. ARC will verify the documents.
STEP 2: Selection

A merit is released based on marks in the qualifying exam and PGETA scores. If a candidate is allotted the first preference in round 1, the seats are auto-frozen, and aspirants must pay the seat acceptance fee. Those candidates who allocated other preferences can choose to self-freeze and must confirm the seat by paying the fee online.
After the final merit list is released, aspirants must fill out their college choice in the online option form and confirm it via ARC.
STEP 3: Seat Allocation & Submission

Post selection, candidates need to download the provisional admission letter and report it to the college for final verification. However, a candidate is allotted a seat in the round (CAP) 1, and students can participate in round 2, 3 or 4.

Additionally the median packages offered for BArch and BVoc programs stood at INR 4.25 LPA and INR 3.6 LPA , respectively. Moreover, the lowest packages recorded for BArch and BVoc programs were INR 3 LPA and INR 2.5 LPA , respectively. Both the programs secured 100% placements during the TSAP - Thakur School of Architecture and Planning placements 2025.

reviews.review_heading: Best Architecture College with State of the Art Infrastructure & Curriculum.
reviews.review_text: TSAP can easily boast of state-of-the-art infrastructure that is at par with international standards. The Advanced digital lab and Computer lab are equipped with high-end workstations with graphic cards, and loaded with several software essential for high-end graphic works. The permanent exhibition space and material museum are unique features. The entire campus is air-conditioned and CCTV-covered. The housekeeping services maintain the campus immaculately clean and tidy. The institute is locate...

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure & faculty members.
reviews.review_text: TSAP provides one of the best infrastructure that helps in the development of students. There are spacious air conditioning studios to work, computer labs with highly updated software, wi-fi, well-equipped library with the facility of e-book, workshop for students to work.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best Architecture colleges in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Thakur school of architecture and planning no doubt has the best infrastructure in comparison to any other college in Mumbai. We have a huge campus where we get to interact with students from other courses as well. We have one of the best libraries, computer lab and studios.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has one of the best infrastructures amongst all the colleges in Mumbai. Our college provides all the facilities for the students. The college takes care of every need of the students. The college also maintains great quality standards. Proper maintenance of infrastructure is also done in terms of hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college, really good infrastructure, provide placements, good faculty, well-equipped.
reviews.review_text: I would take pride in saying that our college has the best infrastructure for an architecture college, as far as I have seen. I can vouch for it since I have attended/ visited many colleges and nothing is at par. We have well-equipped facilities. A huge campus with so many activities and spaces is something to praise. Completely air-conditioned with excellent internet facilities. From classrooms, big studios, computer labs, library, seminar hall, exhibition hall, material library, workshop area,...

reviews.review_heading: TSAP is a newer institute in the feild and it is striving to prepare the best architects.
reviews.review_text: TSAP has one of the best infrastructure in the city of Mumbai. The availability and quality of all facilities is ensured to give the most convenient learning environment to students and maintenance of the campus is one of the top priorities of the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Review of TSAP - Thakur School of Architecture and Planning.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs, classrooms and library are air-conditioned. The entire college is well maintained, and it is cleaned twice a day. Hostels are available in the radius of 5 kilometres from the college. Facilities like canteens, tiffin services and medical stores are closely located, which is helpful for students to reach out easily.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend you join this college for architecture course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college boasts our students. The campus is air-conditioned, safe, well-maintained and spacious with state-of-the-art infrastructure and facilities, and sets it apart from any other institutes of architecture. Facilities like a computer, digital lab and workshops are fully equipped. The college provides an ambient environment that facilitates learning. The canteen facility is available on the campus. However, we have refreshment rooms for a lunch break. The cleanliness i...

reviews.review_heading: Review of  Thakur School of Architecture and Planning.
reviews.review_text: There are various facilities available for students, such has as a computer lab, library, material lab and exhibition hall. Every classroom has Wi-Fi. We also have a sports room, medical room and many more. The college indeed provides the best infrastructure in the city.

reviews.review_heading: State of the art Infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college has state of the art infrastructure and facilities. It makes sure that these facilities are well maintained fully functional. It also has allied spaces like workshops, seminar halls, design cells, etc. To ensure all round development of the students.

reviews.review_heading: The knowledge builds the student as good as the brand does.
reviews.review_text: The college is already famous for the best infrastructure in the Mumbai city for any architecture college. Apart from this, the college has proper maintained facilities with strict maintain nave. The quality of food available in the canteen is also very good. Its an overall good environment for any student to take in education.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges across the country as everything is top-notch.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the major thing about Thakur. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has centralised air-conditioners. Desks are the best. No other college in this country has a drawing table as good as TSAP. Everything is top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the best infrastructure, good facilities, kind and polite faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi facility in every classroom. The college provides a huge computer lab and a library. The college conducts a sports day with both indoor and outdoor games. The whole college is air- conditioned, including classrooms, computer lab and library. There is a projector in each classroom.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the joint efforts by everyone working at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided are in a very student-friendly environment. It inoculates more communication between students and teachers as well as the seniors. The library and labs are well-equipped with all the requirements. The college takes major initiatives in inter-college competitions, be it sports or academics.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members. The college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure when compared to others. Every facility is available in our college. The college provides facilities like library, computer lab, seminar hall, exhibition room, workshop, classrooms and canteen area. The college provides air-conditioned classrooms with comfortable drafting table.
