fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Crescent School of Architecture (B.S.Abdur Rahman University) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Design and Architecture & Planning. College offers B.Arch and B.Des courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Arch. The Crescent School of Architecture (B.S.Abdur Rahman University) course fee ranges between INR 2,00,000 to 12,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    20 seats are available for M.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture.Eligibility Criteria : B.Arch. with minimum CGPA of 5.0 / 50% of Marks.Key Features:Each semester has a research core, supported and developed into practical knowledge with the studio design projects.Apart from this, the entire semester also provides the software theory cum studio subject as an analytical and design tool.The entire course curriculum is structured to provide solid practical base with research as its core.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for M.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for admission to B.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture:-Candidates are selected through counselling based on the rank secured in the National Aptitude Test in Architecture (NATA) and in the qualifying examination.Cleared 10+2 (HSC/ CBSE /ISC etc.) or any other equivalent examination with a minimum aggregate of 50% of Marks in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry.English should be one of the subjects of study.A minimum score with pass in NATA and a minimum aggregate of 50% marks in the qualifying examination.Age Limit : date of birth should fall on after 1st July 2002.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture?

reviews_list.review_title: The college had a very good campus with excellent staff.

review_content.Placements: The college had no placements as per the course structure. In architecture degree, there are no placements from the campus as we have in engineering. The students have to go searching for jobs, or some will take up higher education. So this cannot be considered regarding the architecture course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had a very good infrastructure with separate lecture hall and studio for drafting. A joint studio approach with mezzanine level used for model making. There are specially designed furnitures for architecture drafting and several labs like Cadd lab, climatology lab, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college with good infrastructure and environment.

review_content.Placements: For B.Arch course you don't get placements. But because of the good reputation of the college, you can get selected in very good firms all over India. The academic part of the architecture is excellent due to faculty members and the workshop they conduct every month. Overall it is a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was the best advantages of this college. Each course was defined in their block with modern facilities. The college renovates every building over a period. Amenities are more in college. Especially architecture block is very good in infrastructure and facilities. A library is provided for each department with a good collection of books.

review_summary.college_name: Crescent School of Architecture Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: 100% satisfied with infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: Architects are leaders and entrepreneurs. We can start up our own company or can join as an Architect in any firm. In our 4th year, based on the curriculum, we are supposed to go for 120 days of internship under an Architect. It would be a great opportunity for a student to live an architect life in his course time. Usually during that time, we get to know about the industry in a better way. Moreover, practising architects are coming and reviewing our sheets once in two weeks. That is also a major added advantage for us to have more contacts. So, there is no specific placements in any architectural college. I strongly believe in creating my life by my own. So it is very interesting to search for jobs or internship.

individual_reviews.title: The college had a very good campus with excellent staff.

content.Placements: The college had no placements as per the course structure. In architecture degree, there are no placements from the campus as we have in engineering. The students have to go searching for jobs, or some will take up higher education. So this cannot be considered regarding the architecture course.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a very good infrastructure with separate lecture hall and studio for drafting. A joint studio approach with mezzanine level used for model making. There are specially designed furnitures for architecture drafting and several labs like Cadd lab, climatology lab, etc.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college with good infrastructure and environment.

content.Placements: For B.Arch course you don't get placements. But because of the good reputation of the college, you can get selected in very good firms all over India. The academic part of the architecture is excellent due to faculty members and the workshop they conduct every month. Overall it is a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was the best advantages of this college. Each course was defined in their block with modern facilities. The college renovates every building over a period. Amenities are more in college. Especially architecture block is very good in infrastructure and facilities. A library is provided for each department with a good collection of books.

individual_reviews.title: Crescent School of Architecture is a good college to study in.

content.Placements: Most of our seniors are working at a good firm. Some have even started a firm of their own, which is a good thing because nowadays it's hard to find people in a career related to what they have studied in their UG. Some students have even opened a cafe as their side business. This expands their contacts, and this automatically leads to a lift in projects at their firm.
content.Infrastructure: Red Architects is the firm which is doing projects at our college. They are utilising the wind direction and sun path as well as all those things which we have studied in the past 5 years in our college. The architecture department is newly built, and as of now, it is the best aesthetically and in user's perspective as well.

faqs.question: Are admissions in B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology open?
faqs.answer: Yes, the admissions had started at the month of March itself, it goes till July so if you're not yet applied for the entrance exam kindly apply as soon as possible.Just study physics, chemistry and maths from your 12th book and that's enough.You can see the portion details in the official Crescent website.It will be a online Proctocored exam and you need to answer some 120 questions in 2 hrs .It is enough to get a pass mark in this entrance exam as your admission process and fee depends on your previous grade mark.But the seats in CSE might get filled as you are late but don't hesitate to take IT as it's also good as CSE.All the best.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission to B.Arch at Crescent School of Architecture:-Candidates are selected through counselling based on the rank secured in the National Aptitude Test in Architecture (NATA) and in the qualifying examination.Cleared 10+2 (HSC/ CBSE /ISC etc.) or any other equivalent examination with a minimum aggregate of 50% of Marks in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry.English should be one of the subjects of study.A minimum score with pass in NATA and a minimum aggregate of 50% marks in the qualifying examination.Age Limit : date of birth should fall on after 1st July 2002.

placement_data.complete_content:
Crescent School of Architecture Placement Highlights
As per data collected from multiple sources, the students of Crescent School of Architecture are engaged in several architectural workshops and projects by the placement and training cell of BS Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science & Technology to provide them career impetus. Basis, this pre-placement curriculum, the alumni of Crescent School of Architecture have rated the placements of the institute with 4.0 stars on Shiksha,.com. Some of the top projects handled and workshops conducted at Crescent School of Architecture are listed below:
In 2019, the students of Crescent School of Architecture were engaged in making design models and design sheets for increasing proficiency of the students in future projects
A carpentry workshop was organised in 2018 as a part of the overall development of the students for off-campus placements in diverse fields of architecture and design
In 2017, the top students of Crescent School of Architecture were placed in a lake restoration project. A bamboo workshop was also conducted in the later months to make the students placements ready
In the previous years, the students of the institute were also engaged in multiple projects, such as wall mural design, presentation & model making workshops, bioclimatic architecture and workshop on shelter designing

college_info.intro:
Vanita Vishram Women’s University popular programmes are BBA and BCom. BCom students can work in sectors such as Banking, Finance, Insurance, Accounting, and Taxation. Vanita Vishram Women’s University BCom students are placed in top companies such as TATA Motors, HDFC Bank, and others. The university has prepared one of the most informative and engaging curriculam for students. The BCom course curriculum includes Financial Accounting, Foundation of Business Management, and others.
Overall, Vanita Vishram Women’s University helps in developing new Vocation-based & Employment-Generating, and Skill-based programmes related to the Textile, Diamond, and Hospitality industries. Overall, Vanita Vishram Women’s University is one of the top universities offering specialised courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Uttarakhand Technical University and their respective eligibility and fee:

At the UG level, the university offers BA, BVoc, BSc, BCom, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MA, MSc, MCom, and other courses to students. The total seat intake for BA courses is 500. For some courses, there is a seat reservation. The below-mentioned is seat reservation details for some courses:

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.

review_content.Placements: I completed my B.Com from Vanita Vishram College. During our time, there was COVID-19, and although there was a placement opportunity, only about 15 to 20% of students participated. After earning my B.Com, I found roles as an admin and accountant as a fresher. The B.Com program covers various subjects like accounting, environmental studies, economics, and banking, which helped me learn different skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good teachers, infrastructure, and knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Students who scored above 9 CGPA are the ones who got the best placements. Of course, study is as important as money. If we study well, the package goes above 2 lacs. Scoring above 9 CGPA is not a big deal at VVWU; they will provide all facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything that is important for a good future lies in Vanita Vishram. Classrooms are big, with a projector in each class. The computer lab has 200 PCs. Biological labs are also provided by them. Hostels are clean and provide food much better than other hostels.

review_summary.college_name: Vanita Vishram Women’s University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and best mentors .

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed through this course. The highest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA, the average is 2 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Companies such as Golden Mace, White Range Software, and various other MNCs participated in placements. Around 30% of students secured internships. Common roles included python developer, PHP developer, and UI/UX designer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college, and also the best teachers and the very best mentors. The quality of food in the canteen was the best, and for the 3 years I spent in that college, I used to have the best food in the canteen, which was freaking hygienic and super tasty and also available at reasonable rates.

individual_reviews.title: Great college with affordable pricing.

content.Placements: A business fair conducted on the college campus itself for final-year students. Hospitals like Ashutosh Hospital interview the students and offer jobs. Each student gets an internship in different hospitals due to our dean's good connections.
content.Infrastructure: Very good facilities. They have two libraries with a lot of books for different backgrounds. There are clean rooms and a good environment with a female warden in the girls hostel. Full protection and safety are provided. Sports Day is also conducted every year with different sports games like chess, badminton, long jump, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.

content.Placements: I completed my B.Com from Vanita Vishram College. During our time, there was COVID-19, and although there was a placement opportunity, only about 15 to 20% of students participated. After earning my B.Com, I found roles as an admin and accountant as a fresher. The B.Com program covers various subjects like accounting, environmental studies, economics, and banking, which helped me learn different skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teachers, infrastructure, and knowledge.

content.Placements: Students who scored above 9 CGPA are the ones who got the best placements. Of course, study is as important as money. If we study well, the package goes above 2 lacs. Scoring above 9 CGPA is not a big deal at VVWU; they will provide all facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that is important for a good future lies in Vanita Vishram. Classrooms are big, with a projector in each class. The computer lab has 200 PCs. Biological labs are also provided by them. Hostels are clean and provide food much better than other hostels.

individual_reviews.title: Best three years of my life.

content.Placements: The companies which came for placements were like different accounting firms, different banks for the posts like sales department HR department accounts department marketing department, salary was from Rs.10,000 to Rs.25,000 students also got jobs by clearing DBF exam for banking.
content.Infrastructure: We had huge classrooms with advanced technology to learn like projector facility, library was available for all students which didn't even had textbooks but also different books from all over subjects to gain more knowledge computer labs were also available for us.

college_info.college_name: OP Jindal Global University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary:
OP Jindal University, Sonepat admissions 2026 are open to UG and PG courses. Students can apply online for their desired course through the official university's website.

QS World University Rankings 2026 have been released. According to the same, OP Jindal Global University ranks within 851-900 under the category "World Universities".

table.details: - 851-900 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 under the 'World University' category. - #1 Private University in India, Outlook-ICARE 2024
CUET, JSAT, CAT, CLAT, JEE Main

college_info.intro:
OP Jindal University Sonepat features a range of UG, PG, Diploma, and Integrated courses with the flagship programmes among them being the OP Jindal MBA and BBA. These courses are extended at the PG and UG levels, respectively with their duration being 2-4 years. These courses are extended in the specialisations of:
Students can also pursue an Integrated BBA + MBA courses with admissions depending on JSAT, UGAT/CUET, ACT or SAT entrance exams. While Online MBA is also available and is offered in Association with upGrad. Admission to the OP Jindal BBA needs students to have passed Class 12 (with Mathematics for Business Analytics specialisations) while MBA requires students to have a UG degree with a minimum 50% score.
The OP Jindal MBA and BBA programmes are highly sought-after among students for their career prospects after graduation with alumni of these programmes going on to become brand managers, corporate executives, finance analysts, and a number of other lucrative job roles. Interested students can check the OP Jindal Global University popular programmes below:

placements.overview:
OP Jindal Global University has not released their 2025 placement statistics yet and will be updated here once out. While the 2024 placement data for MA Public Policy released by the university, had a median package of INR 6.6 LPA with a placement rate of 80%. In addition to this the MA Public Policy placements had the highest package reaching INR 11 LPA, while the average package stood at INR 7.5 LPA.

While the top recruiters who visited the campus during the 2024 drive were Amazon, Google, EY, etc. Some other top recruiters who participated during Jindal Global University Sonepat placements in recent years included Amazon, Google, EY, I-PAC, Mahindra, etc. Take a look at the key highlights of the OP Jindal Global University Sonipat placement data given here:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, OP Jindal Global University MBA curriculum does have interships oppurtunities for its students. The MBA curriculum is spread over four semesters that last for two academic year. The curriclum offers internship opportunities during summer and winter vacations.
faqs.question: Does MBA curriculum at OP Jindal Global University include internships?

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at OP Jindal Global University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest and average package offered during MA Public Policy placement 2024 was INR 11 LPA and 7.5 LPA. The median package was 6.6 LPA. 80% placement rate was recorded during the placement drive 2024.
faqs.question: Does OP Jindal Global University have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    According to MA Public Policy placement report, 80% students were placed in 2024.
faqs.question: How many students are getting the placement at O.P. Jindal Global University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: OP Jindal Global University is known for its range of courses extended at the Diploma, Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and PhD levels across the streams of Law, Humanities, Management, Liberal Arts, etc. These courses include BSc, BCom, BA, LLB, BBA, BDes, BArch, etc. at the UG level with the course duration being three to five years.

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the MBA programme at Jindal Global University ranges between INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 17.5 lakh. This fee ranges does not include the hostel fee or the mess fee and only consists the total cost of tuition for the two year MBA programme. The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. Hence, it may vary.
faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA at OP Jindal Global University?

faqs.answer: A:    Accommodation charges are separate from the MBA tuition fee at OP Jindal Global University. Hostel charges are approximately INR 2.31 lac per annum, along with allied service charges. These costs may increase annually by 10%. Students must budget for these additional expenses.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global University.

review_content.Placements: Trilegal, L&L, and Veritas Legal are the most common and repeated recruiters from our law college. Basically, the recruitment process starts at the final period of course completion, which looks for students with zero backlogs. The packages are not very attractive or high but are okay enough for students looking for jobs. Every time, we had to ask permission from everyone in our discipline while exploring visits for internships and projects. This framework was frustrating and made us waste a lot of time asking for permission. This was mainly due to a lack of coordination between the management committee and the employees.

overview_faqs.question: How is campus life like at OP Jindal University?
overview_faqs.answer: OP Jindal Global University provides various facilities to students. The list includes:Hostel: Male and female students are accommodated in separate buildings. There are hallways, communal areas, reading rooms, and pantry facilities in each block. A TV, audio system, pool table, table tennis, billiards table, foosball table, and comfy seats for the students are all included in each common room's setup. Every resident student has access to a laundry facility.OP Jindal has a comprehensive infrastructure to support its academic and student life. The institute has well-equipped classrooms, a library with a vast collection of books and online resources, three auditoriums for various events, hostel facilities for both boys and girls, computer and finance labs, Sports Zone, collaboration and learning spaces, and much more.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Sc available at Jindal School of Government and Public?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BSc course is available in Jindal School of Government and Public. The UG-level course is available in honors degree lasting for four years. Jindal School of Government and Public Policy BSc course is only available in Economics. The BSc (Hons) course is offered as honors with research, conforming with the National Education Policy 2020. The programme offers students with opportunities for dual-degree and studies abroad programme. The BSc Economics (Hons) allows students to pursue further studies in Economics, Public Policy, Management, Banking and Finance, Investment banking, Statistics, Data Science, etc.

review_summary.college_name: OP Jindal Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It was boring and overprotective.

content.Placements: Welspun Group, Bajaj Allianz, Veritas Legal, and Khaitan & Co. were the firms where most of our LL.M. students got hired. The college placement team sent us for internships in our final semester, often through connections with past students of our college. The packages were not very high but were acceptable for the initial stage of work.
content.Infrastructure: The college treated students like school students and tried to spoon-feed them. Even for internships, we were allowed to go out only with guardian representatives from the college. The libraries were maintained in proper condition, as three-fourths of students used them in the afternoon to refer to the syllabus and study case materials.

individual_reviews.title: Jindal's placements are super good, you also get really nice campus .

content.Placements: The packages are pretty average, but the exposure you are offered is unmatched. You get to get along with students from all over the world. If you are planning to build industry connections or just your personal network, Jindal is the place for you. There's no way anyone can feel left out at Jindal's, everyone is super nice here.
content.Infrastructure: I don't think any other college in India offers infrastructure, hostel, and mess facilities like Jindal's. The standards here are really high, and there is no way anyone can hate anything about the infrastructure and facilities. You will never complain about the mess food because there is a lot of variety to eat, and there are always tons of options, even healthy ones.

individual_reviews.title: Partnered with various law firms and consultancies.

content.Placements: Mostly, law firms and consultancies, such as BBNC, LexCounsel, and Zinnov, have partnered with O P Jindal Global Law School to provide students with successive career prospects. Such efforts are not enough, as they provide minimal job offers. However, they offer valuable suggestions for developing a valuable profile through internship experience.
content.Infrastructure: Accommodation for female students was arranged within the campus, while for male students, it was available outside the college campus, nearly one kilometer away. Securing permission from the hostel staff for any purpose requires prior intimation; otherwise, access could be denied if it is not an emergency.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global University.

content.Placements: Trilegal, L&L, and Veritas Legal are the most common and repeated recruiters from our law college. Basically, the recruitment process starts at the final period of course completion, which looks for students with zero backlogs. The packages are not very attractive or high but are okay enough for students looking for jobs. Every time, we had to ask permission from everyone in our discipline while exploring visits for internships and projects. This framework was frustrating and made us waste a lot of time asking for permission. This was mainly due to a lack of coordination between the management committee and the employees.

individual_reviews.title: Sources provided for exam preparations are not enough.

content.Placements: Top consulting firms have good connectivity with the college, but rate of recruitment is not so fulfilling as like the expectations by the students. Even the start pay would be literally between Rs 15,000 to Rs 20,000 per month. But we are paying lakhs of money for getting good placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: To share about the intensive needs, and about our problems regarding the things that happened on the campus as complaint box and some creative measures are implemented at the college. College has a good name and is honored by other colleges for its years of service exclusively for the course of law.

faqs.question: How does JGBS BBA course differentiate itself in preparing students for the business world?
faqs.answer: JGBS is unique in that it provides interdisciplinary curriculum in business education and law, public policy and other courses, giving students a complete picture of the business world.The relationships of the school with major corporates and the most famous international institutions provide practical training and international opportunities.Eligibility for the BBA (Hons.)

faqs.question: Is maths compulsory for BBA in OP Jindal Global University?
faqs.answer: No, maths is not compulsory for BBA in OP Jindal Global University. Even if you did not choose Maths in class 11th or class 12th, you can still apply for BBA. Several colleges admit students without a maths background to BBA programmes.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by O.P. Jindal Global University?
faqs.answer: Yes, OP Jindal University has an entrance exam. Candidates must pass an entrance exam in order to enrol in various programmes at the institution. TheJindal Scholastic Aptitude Test (JSAT)is administered by the university for admission to various courses. In addition, it accepts the results of a number of national and state-level entrance exams. Tabulated below is the list of a few popular courses along with the entrance exam that the university accepts:CoursesEntrance Exam AcceptedMScMAT,CMAT,CMAT,JSATBScGMAT,CMAT,BAUGAT,  JSAT,  SAT IndiaMBA/PGDMMAT,  XAT,  CAT,NMAT,CMAT,ATMA,GMAT,  UGAT,  JSAT,  SAT India

faqs.question: What is JSAT entrance test at OP Jindal University?
faqs.answer: Jindal Scholastic Aptitude Test or JSATis a common entrance test conducted byO.P. Jindal Global Universityinhome-proctored online modefor admission to a number of undergraduate courses in Management, Law, Commerce and Humanities streams. Candidates can book their test as per their convenience during the application/test window.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to OP Jindal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers direct admission to a lot of its courses based on students' aggregate in class 12 and performance in the interview round. For admission, it is further also necessary that the student has passed class 12 with the required marks as per the applied course. Admission to courses such as MBA and BTech is through national-level entrance exams.

placement_data.title: OP Jindal Global University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The consolidated placement report of OP Jindal Global University is not released. According to the latest data available, the highest and average package received during MA Public Policy placement 2024 was INR 11 LPA and 7.5 LPA . Top recruiters such as Amazon, Google and EY have visited the campus in recent past.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at OP Jindal Global University?
faqs.answer: The OP Jindal Global University highest package has not been released officially. MBA Public Policy highest in 2024 was INR 11 LPA. Some of the students have mentioned in the Shiksha students' reviews that the highest package offered in recent placements was INR 21 LPA. Further, the lowest package offered over the past few years was INR 3 LPA. The OP Jindal Global University average package for the past few years was around INR 6 LPA to INR 7 LPA. There are no official statistics for OP Jindal MBA placements.

faqs.question: Does MBA curriculum at OP Jindal Global University include internships?
faqs.answer: Yes, OP Jindal Global University MBA curriculum does have interships oppurtunities for its students. The MBA curriculum is spread over four semesters that last for two academic year. The curriclum offers internship opportunities during summer and winter vacations.

faqs.question: Who were the top recruiters during OP Jindal Global University placements?
faqs.answer: A few companies who recently visited the campus during placement drives were Amazon, Google, EY, etc. While other top recruiters who participated who have regularly participated in Jindal Global University Sonepat placements included Dabur, Square Yards, M & C Saatchi, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during OP Jindal Global University placements?
faqs.answer: The overall average package data is not released. Howevver, the average package recorded during OP Jindal Global University placement 2024 for MA Public Policy course was 7.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA at OP Jindal Global University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA programme at Jindal Global University ranges between INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 17.5 lakh. This fee ranges does not include the hostel fee or the mess fee and only consists the total cost of tuition for the two year MBA programme. The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. Hence, it may vary.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BBA at OP Jindal University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BBA programme at OP Jindal University is between INR 16 lakh and INR 18 lakh . The BBA course is available at the university in multiple specialisations. Out of the six offered specialisations , a few are Marketing, HR, Finance, Entrepreneurship, Business Analytics, etc. Candidates seeking admission to JGU BBA (H) courses shall meet the minimum eligibility criteria . Candidate should have passed Class 12 or equivalent exam pass from a recognised board. Candidates with Maths in Class 12 are preferred for admission to BBA (H) specialisations: Business Analytics and Financial Markets. Candidates need to have good scores in CUET , UGAT , JSAT , or SAT India to be selected for admission. The university also offers integrated courses.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Sc at O.P Jindal Global University?
faqs.answer: Jindal School of Government and Public Policy BSc fees are around INR 12 lakh - INR 18 lakh. The fee might include components other than the tuition fee, such as a one-time fee payment of INR 50,000 , and hostel fee of INR 12.40 lakh . The BSc admission will be confirmed once you submit the required documents, which will be verified, and the payment of the full semester fees. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national and international ranking agencies, O.P. Jindal Global University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #70 in the India Today 2025 under the Engineering (Private) category, and #98 under Engineering. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around O.P. Jindal Global University rankings:

outlook.description:
O.P. Jindal Global University has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for O.P. Jindal Global University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, O.P. Jindal Global University's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, O.P. Jindal Global University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. O.P. Jindal Global University's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, O.P. Jindal Global University climbed 150 ranks to #851 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Asia' category have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, O.P. Jindal Global University climbed 108 ranks to #163 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The 'Southern Asia' category rankings of the institute have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, O.P. Jindal Global University climbed 36 ranks to #24 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: OP Jindal Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University’s hall of residence for students consists of several blocks of building designed by a French architect. There are corridors, open spaces and common rooms within each blocks. There are separate blocks for male and female students. The accommodation for students in these blocks follows international norms and the room are aesthetically furnished. Hygiene is an important consideration in these Halls. In addition, the campus provides recreational facilities including a gymnasium and other indoor and outdoor games. The surrounding are fully landscaped with lawns, bushes and trees.
facilities: Hostel: Male and female students are accommodated in separate buildings. There are hallways, communal areas, reading rooms, and pantry facilities in each block. A TV, audio system, pool table, table tennis, billiards table, foosball table, and comfy seats for the students are all included in each common room's setup. Every resident student has access to a laundry facility.

library.description: The Library has a collection of about 48000 print volumes and an array of electronic resources. The print collection includes books, monographs, research reports, law reports, and back volumes of periodicals etc. In addition to professional reading, the library provides a good amount of leisure reading and books for soft skills development. All subjects related to the University's academic and research programmes have been included in the collection. Print resources of the library have been divided into general collection and reference collection.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Courts, Table Tennis, Pool/Snooker, Multipurpose Sports Area

All subjects related to the University's academic and research programmes have been included in the collection. Print resources of the library have been divided into general collection and reference collection.

cafeteria.description: The O.P. Jindal Global University has world-class food court – “Biswamil Bistro” reflecting the global aspirations and Indian traditions. Outlets at this food court of JGU provide multi-cuisine options through brands such as Subway, Burger Point, 34 Chowringhee Lane, Street Food by Punjab Grill, Bercos, Moti Mahal, Domino's Pizza, Breakfast Round the Clock {BRC} and Keventers. A wide range of Vegetarian and Non-vegetarian food options are thus available for the benefit of the Students, Faculty, Staff and Guests/Visitors of JGU. The university also has the Tuck Shops like Coffee Café Day, Juice N More and Nescafe.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It was boring and overprotective.
reviews.review_text: The college treated students like school students and tried to spoon-feed them. Even for internships, we were allowed to go out only with guardian representatives from the college. The libraries were maintained in proper condition, as three-fourths of students used them in the afternoon to refer to the syllabus and study case materials.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Jindal Global Business School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Jindal's placements are super good, you also get really nice campus .
reviews.review_text: I don't think any other college in India offers infrastructure, hostel, and mess facilities like Jindal's. The standards here are really high, and there is no way anyone can hate anything about the infrastructure and facilities. You will never complain about the mess food because there is a lot of variety to eat, and there are always tons of options, even healthy ones.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Partnered with various law firms and consultancies.
reviews.review_text: Accommodation for female students was arranged within the campus, while for male students, it was available outside the college campus, nearly one kilometer away. Securing permission from the hostel staff for any purpose requires prior intimation; otherwise, access could be denied if it is not an emergency.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global University.
reviews.review_text: Trilegal, L&L, and Veritas Legal are the most common and repeated recruiters from our law college. Basically, the recruitment process starts at the final period of course completion, which looks for students with zero backlogs. The packages are not very attractive or high but are okay enough for students looking for jobs. Every time, we had to ask permission from everyone in our discipline while exploring visits for internships and projects. This framework was frustrating and made us waste a lot...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Sources provided for exam preparations are not enough.
reviews.review_text: To share about the intensive needs, and about our problems regarding the things that happened on the campus as complaint box and some creative measures are implemented at the college. College has a good name and is honored by other colleges for its years of service exclusively for the course of law.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Show focus on technical education and career.
reviews.review_text: Instead of providing strict rules, terms, and conditions, the college had given liberty and freedom to the students considering the course nature. The format and procedures followed on the campus for all the activities were simplified and easy to follow by all the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is bound by various rules.
reviews.review_text: I'm much more disappointed by the college and their developments, it was highly frustrating for me because of their guidelines. They don’t take any steps to get connected with the college alumni and to make their networking stronger. As a law school, it is bound by a lot of rules which are similar to laws.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 15 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A lot of trouble with placements.
reviews.review_text: College management was very money-minded and asked students to pay fees for everything. Until the completion of the course, they continued to charge for various things. Any delay in fee payment would result in additional charges as penalties.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Can't guess about performance of academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: College has no policy of providing seats under management quota. Hostels are sometimes maintained in a hygienic way, which may cause the spread of various diseases, especially during rainy seasons. For any emergencies, especially for a medical emergency, we should approach the hospital, which is 5 km away from the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is okay for the low pay.
reviews.review_text: The webinar halls were too tight to handle more than 500 students at a time. So the whole campus events were mostly conducted in open auditorium. But college was high enough to prize and certified all the talented students who participated in the winners and other colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 28 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Suggest implementing some supplemented ideas for getting better with college performance.
reviews.review_text: Even though it's a college popularized for the courses of law, college often took some measures to groom the students. For practice sessions, moot courts were initiated in the college in 2021, which was highly helpful for the students. Yet the attire of the college was heart-warming.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a great law and private college.
reviews.review_text: Jindal Global Law School is one of the best private law schools, offering everything you need, from a vast library with its aesthetics to a great canteen and campus. There are also small malls nearby for shopping and popular food franchise brands.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an organization with some boundaries.
reviews.review_text: For providing coaching for various exams special halls with maximum seating are available at all times for arranging immediate unplanned sessions. For security reasons, even the intern students are not allowed to get their everyday plan information.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 19 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Time flies and so the course got covered before I know it!
reviews.review_text: The college has such graceful and friendly seniors, juniors, and teachers. Special attention is provided to the students who are interested in sports and joined in sports quota. College extended their helping hands to support students based on their passion. Liberal movement of students was encouraged on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Jindal Global Law School, O.P. Jindal Global UniversityReviewed on 17 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good, but it could be better.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good facilities, and the food offers a good variety but tastes average. The medical facilities are good and very efficient. All kinds of sports are available, including badminton, basketball, cricket, athletics, and swimming. There is a very expensive and fancy sports complex that provides everything, though it is very crowded.

college_info.college_name: OP Jindal Global University

data.description: OP Jindal Global University has a huge number of professors who graduated from IIMs. Their teaching pedagogy is excellent, and students can gain industry-based knowledge. Professors are always approachable and friendly. The university has a over 1,100 diverse faculty members with 56% of the faculty being female and the other 44% male.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about O.P. Jindal Global University

likes.text: A large number of students secure placements in top companies such as Deloitte, Faber, Kantar, Tanishq, Amul, and more.
Our college has promised that after the first semester, students get to work with many big firms as an intern, which would add a great experience to their CVs.

faqs.answer: University of Agricultural Sciences (UAS), Dharwad is definitely a good option for candidates who have interest towards agricultural sciences and want to pursue it. The admissions at University of Agricultural Sciences is both entrance-based and merit based. The admission procedure is different for each course. The admission to B.Tech UG course is based on Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET). The admission to other UG courses is based on the academic merit of the candidate. For PG and PhD admissions, UAS takes an entrance exam. The candidates must regularly visit the official website of the UAS to remain updated with any changes in the admission procedure, eligibility criteria, etc.

review_summary.college_name: UAS Dharwad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The price structure and study are very good on this campus, and all facilities are good.

content.Placements: The placement is based on the CGPA. Above 9 CGPA, you have been to good companies. Otherwise, the highest package is 24 Lacs, the lowest is 9 Lacs, and the average is 10 to 12 Lac. Approximately 30-40% of students got internships in SEED, fertilizer, and agriculture-related companies.
content.Infrastructure: Bank price texture and the facility are good in this university. Like a classroom, ability and AC are also available. Equipments like these are also available in the boys’ hostel. Foods are good in the canteen. Also, outdoor and indoor sports are also available with guidance .

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Soil Science and Agricultural Chemistry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied completely, but still so much is there to explore. Good environment and good teaching.

content.Placements: Very few percent of students joined the course; we are 6 students in my batch. The average salary will be 30 to 35k, with a maximum of 40k and a minimum of 25k. IFFCO and other fertilizer and chemical companies related to agriculture are recruiting. No one gets an internship. The top role offered is manager of sales .
content.Infrastructure: We have a 24-hour Wi-Fi facility. Good labs with good infrastructure, digital classrooms, and good library facilities. In hostels, we have the facilities of Wi-Fi, good rooms, and healthy food. The canteen facility was good. For playing, we have both an outdoor and indoor stadium and a gym facility. We have a medical clinic in college.

content.Placements: As college has lot of students placement is very good Private related come forward to dig out the talented via tests and face to face interview many students do master degree and aim at becoming professors and rest of the crowd aim at civil services exam and many have cleared it also.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very neatly and wisely arranged and constructed library consists lot of agriculture related books which help students to refer them. There is a Wi-Fi availability in library and hostel which also helps students to go through the online knowledge.

content.Placements: No better placements. But you can get a good ranking and bring in PG courses. And you can become an agriculture officer, and there are many jobs in the private sector in SEED companies and banks and many more, and you can also try for the competitive exam.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Hostel facilities are good; they provide free Wi-Fi in both the hostel and the college. And the food is also good. We have to adjust; that's it. Hostel fees are around 2500 to 3000 per month. Overall, hostel facilities are good to tell and experience.

individual_reviews.title: Presently, it is an average college with good opportunities and campus life.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the campus. Writing competitive exams is the alternate option. There is no placement history. Even the placement cell opens for once in a while but you can prepare for other B.Sc. Agri degree based exams for your job. No hope on college placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infra is planned and good. But the hostel is a little complicated. Courses are little different than other universities but they are helpful in studies. Sometimes the syllabus gets finished while sometimes not. Hostel facilities are not bad.

admission_process.title: University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad admission 2025 isentrance-based. The university accepts the Karnataka Common Entrance Test to select students for various UG, and PG courses. Further, the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad also accepts ICAR entrance exam scores for admission to UG and PG courses.

The university offers various courses atUG and PG levelsinAgriculture. To get seat at the university, students must fulfil eligibility and selection criteria set by the University. Read below for more detailed information about the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad admission, along with course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat intake, fees and admission process 2025:

To gain admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses at the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad, students meet minimum eligibility criteria and complete subsequent selection rounds. Below are the course-specific eligibility requirements and selection criteria for the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad courses:

University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad admissions for 2025 are entrance-based, including undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programs in Agriculture. The university, along with its seven affiliated colleges, offers a range of courses and accepts applications online. See the process forUniversity of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwadadmissions in 2025:

headings.text: University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Steps for University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad Admission Process 2025

lists: The admission process at the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad begins with the application process. students must apply online through the university's official website. The application form needs to be filled out and all necessary details must be given. The application fee is to be paid online, and students must make sure they attach payment receipt along with the filled application form before submission.
For admission to undergraduate and postgraduate courses, students must meet the specified eligibility criteria and clear the required entrance exams.

Admission to the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad programmes is based on performance in entrance exams. students must qualify through either the state-level or the national-level entrance exam, depending on the course. Those who meet the eligibility criteria and pass the entrance exams will be selected for further selection rounds, which may include interviews or counselling sessions.

After the completion of all selection rounds, the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad will release merit lists in several rounds for the respective courses. students whose names appear on the merit lists will be invited to participate in counselling process. During counselling, students must present their original documents for verification and pay required admission fee to get their seats.

placement_data.title: UAS Dharwad Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: UAS Dharwad has not released latest placement data on its official website yet. However, the NIRF report 2021 showcases some key placement data. According to the NIRF report 2021, UAS Dharwad had concluded its 2020 placements with 141 students placed . Out of the total students placed, 80 students were from the BTech programmes and 61 were from the MSc programmes .

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of University of Agricultural Sciences?
faqs.answer: Some of the top recruiters of University of Agricultural Sciences (UAS), Dharwad were UPL, Bayer, Syngenta, Corteva Agriscience, etc. . UAS has not released their placement statistics on their official website since 2020. In 2020 the highest package was about 8 Lacs per annum and the median package was around 5 Lacs per annum. According to the college reviews written by the students of UAS, it is reported that the highest package for the 2023 passed out batch was near about 11 Lacs per annum and the median package was 6.5 Lacs per annum. Overall the placement scenario has improved since 2020. Placement wise UAS is a decent university.

faqs.question: Does the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad release separate placement data for the BSc programme?
faqs.answer: No, the University of Agricultural Sciences, Dharwad has not provided placement details exclusively for the BSc course. Instead, placement information is shared collectively for all UG 4-year programmes, including BSc, in the NIRF 2024 report.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied completely, but still so much is there to explore. Good environment and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: We have a 24-hour Wi-Fi facility. Good labs with good infrastructure, digital classrooms, and good library facilities. In hostels, we have the facilities of Wi-Fi, good rooms, and healthy food. The canteen facility was good. For playing, we have both an outdoor and indoor stadium and a gym facility. We have a medical clinic in college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best agricultural university in the world.
reviews.review_text: There is a very neatly and wisely arranged and constructed library consists lot of agriculture related books which help students to refer them. There is a Wi-Fi availability in library and hostel which also helps students to go through the online knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Better college to study agriculture.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Hostel facilities are good; they provide free Wi-Fi in both the hostel and the college. And the food is also good. We have to adjust; that's it. Hostel fees are around 2500 to 3000 per month. Overall, hostel facilities are good to tell and experience.

reviews.review_heading: Presently, it is an average college with good opportunities and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infra is planned and good. But the hostel is a little complicated. Courses are little different than other universities but they are helpful in studies. Sometimes the syllabus gets finished while sometimes not. Hostel facilities are not bad.

reviews.review_heading: Happiness is great on campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but the hostel is poor. The food is good. Some students complain that the food is not good but if they go outside this campus, they realise how other college hostels are. We have good food served in our hostel than any other student.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the top in India with good looking campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and the hostel is also great. Facilities are very good like the library and digital projector. Even classrooms are also good. There is a separate playground for cricket, kabaddi, and volleyball in the hostel. Hostel food is not bad. There are 2 study centers in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel infrastructure is good. In the hostel 24X7 water supply is available, and clean mineral drinking water is also provided. Hostel and mess are cleaned once in 2 to 3 days. The mess is hygienic and clean, and the student gets a variety of food every day.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is absolutely the best.
reviews.review_text: College and hostel have Wi-Fi facility, well-equipped labs, quality of food is good and average mess bill. One van is available 24x7 for medical emergency. There is large ground at entrance. All type of games are played in that ground.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in India. If you get admission here, don't miss the opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good Wi-Fi network throughout the college campus, including the library, departments, and hostels. Labs are well-stocked with materials, and classrooms are equipped with smartboards and projectors. We have a large, two-story library on campus, as well as two study centres. The hostel is good for food and accommodation. The college has a volleyball court and a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Super college, don't miss your college life if you get admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is having beautiful facilities. In hostels, library we have Wi-Fi and lavs are good, classrooms are very good and vast with 60 students and for practical classes, only 30 students are there so there is good scope for learning and study. We will have a hostel day feast every month in a hostel where special food is done.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has experienced faculty and the availability of fields for research.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms on our campus have facilities like smart class teaching. The labs in our college have sophisticated equipment which is mandatory for each subject. Our library is accommodated with Wi-Fi and there are many books, including competitive subjects, that are also available. Our hostel in our college has good Wi-Fi facilities. We have a good canteen with good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for agricultural studies and research and has a huge land for research purposes.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is enabled with Wi-Fi and the hostels are equipped with Wi-Fi. We have a good library. The laboratories are well-equipped. We have a large playground and a university hospital. College conducts many competition in sports and games. Sports students have a great life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent facilities for allied subjects.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are hygienic and good enough to study in. Every hostel floor has Wi-Fi to give students the opportunity to gain more knowledge through the internet. Labs are highly hygienic and the equipments are well enough. The library is highly sophisticated.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and average placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: Even though the hostel is very old in our college, it has all facilities in it like a bathroom, room, nice ventilation, and a 24*7 electricity supply. But in these hostels, there are no facilities for hot water for bathing. Apart from this, all things are good. The surrounding is nice.

review_summary.college_name: IEC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, decent infrastructure and average labs.

content.Placements: Average package around 2 to 3 LPA, top roles offered are quality control in pharmaceutical industries and quality assurance in pharmaceutical companies as well. Some companies that offer placements are Torrent Pharmaceuticals and abbott etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are available for most major subjects like three pharmacology labs, a pharmacognosy lab, Chemistry labs for organic and inorganic Chemistry analysis labs. Wi-Fi is currently available but is available till last semester. Lecture halls are present with around 100 seats and projectors and white and blackboards, and a two storey library is also available.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with it because there are many good faculty members and infrastructure too.

content.Placements: 65 to 70% of students were placed in my course. The highest package offered was between 2.5 to 3 LPA, the average was up to 1.5 to 2 LPA, and the lowest was up to 80000. Many top companies like DRDO, BARC, etc, recruited. Almost 65% of students got internships in top companies from my course. Roles like Sales Manager, Salesperson, etc, were offered under my course.
content.Infrastructure: There were many facilities available for my course, like free Wi-Fi, fully air conditioned classrooms, and many libraries. Hostel facilities were more than acceptable, as the quality of food was too good, and they maintained hygiene. Many indoor and outdoor activities were organized with annual events.

individual_reviews.title: The staff is very helpful and also well-educated. Facilities for students are also good.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students from our batch got placed because most of the students didn’t come to college for placement. The company didn’t tell about the package, but the average package is 2 LPA. Students who were involved in placement all got placed in a good company with a good package.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms. Classrooms are always clean, and proper facilities are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available, but there is no quality food in the hostel. Sports and games facilities are better than in all other colleges.

individual_reviews.title: IEC University offers a decent learning environment with supportive and qualified faculty.

content.Placements: IEC University offers the Bachelor of Pharmacy (B. Pharmacy) course with a focus on pharmaceutical sciences practical training and research skills. In terms of placements the university provides basic opportunities but the overall placement scenario can be considered average. Most students get placed in small to mid level pharmaceutical companies.
content.Infrastructure: University provides decent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, library, and sports facilities, though mostly basic. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with safe rooms, average mess food, medical support, and options for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.title: The campus of University is also good. The crowd in University is also little more.

content.Placements: Placement facility of the university is quite decent. As more than 75% of the students got placed in the top companies. The university also arranges the convocation meetings, which helps the students to get more knowledge about their careers. The university is quite good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of classrooms, labs, and the library is good. They have wide areas for classrooms and labs. The condition of classrooms and labs is good. In labs, you will get every instrument to perform your experiments. The quality of food in the canteen is also good.

admission_overview.college_name: IEC University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: ICE University admission 2025 are both merit and entrance based. To be eligible for the courses at ICE University, the aspiring candidates need to have class 12 or graduation degree.ICE Universityprovides various courses, such as MBA, BSc, BTech, BA, BCom and BDes.

For IEC University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toIEC University courseadmissions 2025:

IEC University fees may include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay for a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The below table mentions the IEC University fees for various UG & PG courses:
IEC University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for IEC admissions 2025:
Step 1: IEC University Application Process 2025

The admission process at IEC University for the academic year 2025 commences with the application procedure. Interested candidates can obtain the application form from the university's official website. The duly filled application form should be submitted either through post or in person at the designated department at IEC University. Additionally, the application and entrance test fees are to be paid online, and candidates must attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all PG courses at IEC University is entrance-based. Candidates are required to qualify for either the university-level or state-level entrance examinations such as MAT or CAT for MBA/PGDM courses and JEE Main for BE/BTech courses. Moreover, admission to UG courses is based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying examination.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

Following the completion of all selection rounds, candidates are expected to participate in the counselling process for their respective courses. Subsequently, IEC University will publish merit lists in various rounds comprising the names of selected candidates

faqs.question: Can I get into IEC University without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: No,  A valid JEE Main score is required for admission to IEC University's B.Tech program. Based on their merit in both the entrance exam and the qualifying exam, students are chosen.IEC University additionally requires the following for admission:For B.Tech aspirants, a legitimate UPSEE/JEE main scoreA candidate's GATE score for MTechA candidate's CAT/MAT/XAT/ATMA score for an MBA30% or above in NATA is required to apply for a B.Arch.For overseas applications, an IELTS (academic) score of 6.0 or a TOEFL (IBT) score of 60–78 or a TOEFL (paper) score of 513-547For admission to the IEC School of Pharmacy, a minimum cumulative score of 45% (or 40% for SC/ST) from an accredited State Education Board or Open School Education Board of the Central or State Government.Candidates can appear in JEE Main for three consecutive years after passing their class 12/qualifying exam.

placement_data.title: IEC University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: IEC University has a proactive placement department with a strong professional network across various sectors. As per the official statistics, 542 students were placed in 97 companies during IEC University placements 2023. Of all the recruiters, TCS recruited the highest number of students. Alongside this, the University has also released the list of students selected for internships. Milestone Gears Pvt. Ltd., Santech Machines, and Reliance Jio Infocom Ltd. were some prominent companies that offered internships in recent years.

faqs.question: Is IEC University good for placements?
faqs.answer: The University has released the placement data on its official website, irrespective of the year. Considering the stats for 2023, 542 students were placed. Furthermore, 97 companies offered job opportunities to the 2023 passing-out batch. Check the important details related to IEC University placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Students placed 542 Companies offered jobs 97 Students offered internships 90

faqs.question: Does IEC University really provide 100% placements with great salaries?
faqs.answer: The placement rate for IEC University has not been disclosed. However, the number of students placed and the number of students offered internships in recent years has been released, which is mentioned below: Particulars Placement Statistics Students placed 542 Students offered internships 90 NOTE: The aforementioned details are collated from the official website, however, the year of placements is not disclosed. Hence, considering it for 2023 .

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, decent infrastructure and average labs.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available for most major subjects like three pharmacology labs, a pharmacognosy lab, Chemistry labs for organic and inorganic Chemistry analysis labs. Wi-Fi is currently available but is available till last semester. Lecture halls are present with around 100 seats and projectors and white and blackboards, and a two storey library is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with it because there are many good faculty members and infrastructure too.
reviews.review_text: There were many facilities available for my course, like free Wi-Fi, fully air conditioned classrooms, and many libraries. Hostel facilities were more than acceptable, as the quality of food was too good, and they maintained hygiene.  Many indoor and outdoor activities were organized with annual events.

reviews.review_heading: The staff is very helpful and also well-educated. Facilities for students are also good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms. Classrooms are always clean, and proper facilities are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available, but there is no quality food in the hostel. Sports and games facilities are better than in all other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: IEC University offers a decent learning environment with supportive and qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: University provides decent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, library, and sports facilities, though mostly basic. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with safe rooms, average mess food, medical support, and options for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The campus of University is also good. The crowd in University is also little more.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms, labs, and the library is good. They have wide areas for classrooms and labs. The condition of classrooms and labs is good. In labs, you will get every instrument to perform your experiments. The quality of food in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything was good. Thank you.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there are fabulous facilities. I'm pursuing BPT, and there is an anatomy lab for students, a separate library, and educated teachers. The quality of education is good, and our mess serves quality food in my college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Himachal Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college has big playgrounds, big library, canteen, sports room, big auditoriums and spacious classrooms. We have Science labs, management labs and computer labs. We have many fests, events and extra-curricular activities with healthy environment.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college that you can ask for.
reviews.review_text: The college / university has good infrastructure. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, Labs, Library, Indoor games halls and outdoor games fields, cafeterias, gardens, medical rooms, etc. are available. Food in the cafeteria is also good and they prepare that with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IEC University.
reviews.review_text: There are well-equipped labs and classrooms. There is a hostel facility for students who live far away. The mess food is also good. There is also a sports and games facility. Tournaments and programs are held yearly, and students have shown active participation in that.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college for gaining knowledge & has good environment & is helpful for learnining.
reviews.review_text: The quality is all about the infrastructure of the campus and it's all about neatness. They prepare quality food and quality infrastructure and the maintenance of the quality of every product is so valuable and so amazing. We can also order them to cook the food. They take orders and give us quality food and it's all about response and respect to each and every one. BUt the maintain neatness and the environment is so friendly for learning.

reviews.review_heading: IEC University Middle Class Family Admission.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members were very qualified people. They always help students in every way out to make sure the betterment of the students. They take many small tests and quizzes in between the classes which were mandatory for the students. Each course shall have a number of credits assigned to it, depending upon the academic load of the course determined by the weekly contact hours.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a really good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All labs, classrooms and library are highly air-conditioned. There is a Wi-Fi facility all over the campus and also in the hostel. Three types of hostels are provided, i.e., single sharing, double sharing and triple sharing. The food served in the hostel was good, and they maintain hygiene in the hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied studying here.
reviews.review_text: The university overall is superb and huge, and the infrastructure is amazing. Even the hostel, classrooms, washrooms are 100% hygienic and tidy. The canteen provides fresh items, and first aid facilities are amazing. Grounds are big as well.

reviews.review_heading: Very good university, there are well-qualified teachers, and the placements are good in 2016.
reviews.review_text: There is high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. High technology labs, digital library, are available. Organisation events of sports, some information events, are provided. Very good food is available in the canteen, which resembles home-made food. Large hostel rooms are available in this university. Only 30% of the students face the issues.

reviews.review_heading: This college gives you an assurance for the placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi services, labs, classrooms, and a library all are good. Hostel facilities are good. The food available in the mess and the canteen is too good. Sports and game facilities are very good. In the mess and the canteen, the environment is cool and fresh.

college_info.college_name: IEC University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IEC University offers Diploma, undergraduate, postgraduate, postgraduate diploma, MPhil and PhD programmes. Tabulated below is the fee for some of the popular courses offered at IEC University:

Master of Business Administration degree is available in Himachal Pradesh's IEC University. The programme is for two years. The cost of IEC University's MBA programme is INR 1,81,900. A graduation degree from any stream or passing an equivalent test with at least 50% of the possible points (45% for SC/ST students) is required for admission to the MBA programme.

IEC University offers several types of scholarships to BA students based on their financial condition, higher senior secondary and other criteria. The students with 85% or above in Class 12 will get special concessions as their first semester fees will be remitted. For other scholarships apart from merit, there could be additional requirements based on socioeconomic status or special categories such as reserved categories.

The Merit Scholarship at IEC University is purely based on the students' performance in the qualifying exam exams. A student who has scored more than 85% in Class 12 can take advantage of this scholarship programme. The scholarships are provided for first-year students only.
